home.title: Superguide: Your Intelligent Travel Companion
home.description: Planning the perfect trip often feels like an impossible puzzle. Travelers juggle countless factors across dozens of tabs and apps, leading to frustration and suboptimal itineraries. Superguide transforms this chaos into a smart, personalized itinerary—automatically.
home.tagline: Tell us when, who, and what you love. Superguide handles the rest.
home.feature1Desc: Attractions intelligently grouped by proximity, with high-quality eateries naturally integrated into your routes—no manual research needed.
home.feature2Desc: Many attractions offer vastly different experiences depending on the time of year. Superguide factors in seasonality so you never miss the best version of a destination.
home.feature3Desc: Balancing the desires of foodies, sightseers, and budget travelers within a group? Superguide finds the perfect plan for everyone.
